title: Recipe Ingredient Entity Extraction
description: NLP sequence labeling project using CRF to extract ingredients, quantities, and units from unstructured recipe text.
insights: Built a token-level NER pipeline with 20+ linguistic, regex, keyword, and contextual features per token.
Handled class imbalance with inverse-frequency weighting and ingredient penalty tuning.
Achieved zero ingredient-token misclassifications on validation data.
